title: API Traffic Analytics
tagline: Distributed real-time traffic analysis built in Go
description: A distributed system that analyzes API traffic in real time, built on a microservices architecture with Go, Kafka, and Redis, with full server monitoring through Prometheus and Grafana.
highlights: Event-streaming pipeline on Kafka for real-time ingestion and processing
Go microservices with Redis for low-latency state
Server monitoring with Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards
